lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, didn't expect to find a scientist out here.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I'm out here on a mission, do you think I chose to hang around these lowlifes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not one to judge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this 'mission' you mentioned?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I'm out here to conduct research, I've been told a giant spider lurks in the heart of the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Her venom is priceless and it would aid me greatly in my research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Research? What could you possibly want with a giant spider's venom?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Venenatis is the last of her kind. Lots of giant spiders used to dwell deep in the mountains until the savage dwarves killed them all.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: She is the last one left and I must have a sample of her venom.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: What I want with the specimen however, is none of your business!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woah sorry, didn't mean to touch a nerve. Fighting a giant spider sounds like a great idea.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I've tried to put it off for as long as I could, but this is the final component needed for my research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then what are you waiting around here for? Go out there and fight her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure you're equipped to take it down? I've had the displeasure of dealing with Venenatis, she will not go down easily.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: It will not be easy, but if I can get her when she's wounded in her lair, it should be a fairer fight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't know she had a lair. I thought she just roamed the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: She only returns there to lick her wounds and rest, I need to be patient.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So that explains why you're waiting here.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I would go out and fight her now, but I must admit, I am also a little scared. I've never been in a fight before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure you'll be alright, it's just a gigantic spider!

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Thanks for your words of confidence...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Well, would you look at that. Most fascinating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me what's so fascinating?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: It's a rare Zamorakian artifact. I haven't seen any quite like this one before.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: If you look closely, you can see that it has a socket where you can place an item to increase its power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: So it's real. Magnificent.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've seen this before?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: No, but I have heard tales of the mighty Vet'Ion.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: It is said his skull can power a certain Zamorakian weapon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting! I'll be on the lookout for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Well, would you look at that. Most fascinating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me what's so fascinating?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: It's a rare Zamorakian artifact. I haven't seen any quite like this one before.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: If you look closely, you can see that it has a socket where you can place an item to increase its power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, like this skull?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Yes, like that one! That looks powerful indeed. I think that would do quite nicely.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: A skilled crafter can combine the two. If you wish, I could do it for you... For a price, that is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money for that.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Feel free to come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: There we go! All done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Do you know someone who might know more?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Andros Mai is a very... Devoted man. If you can see past that, he may be able to help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Yes! Those belong to Venenatis!

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Ah, but they contain no more venom. That is disappointing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're saying they're useless?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: To me? Yes. But maybe not to you.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I've seen that Derse Venator guy over there handle similar items. Perhaps he knows more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Do you know anything about this?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: No, I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Do you know someone who might know more?

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: Downstairs there's a strange looking person. I don't know what that item is, but if anyone would, I reckon she would.

lines.speaker: Phabelle Bile
lines.text: I think she said her name was Madam Sikaro.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!
